macos_preflight.notes: Official online update from router Web UI at 192.168.0.1. No static recovery IP was used. Exact Mac interface and route ownership were not recorded.

recovery_entry.led_state_observed: Several front LEDs remained visible in submitted screenshots; exact reboot/off transition was not captured.

readiness_observations.notes: Admin UI at 192.168.0.1 returned to the local-password login screen about 3m35s after upgrade confirmation. Ping and TTL were not recorded.

transfer.first_packet_timing: Official Web UI online update was confirmed at about 5s; visible download phase started by 14s.

post_upload.notes: Visible timeline: download phase at 0% around 14s, upgrade/write phase at 1% around 31s, upgrade/write phase at 100% around 47s, admin login page reachable around 3m35s. Progress reaching 100% did not mean the router was usable. Overnight check on 2026-05-17 around 10:46 confirmed admin UI remained reachable, firmware stayed at 1.5.11 Build 20251119 rel.49503(4341), DHCP remained enabled, range stayed 192.168.0.2-192.168.0.253, lease time stayed 120 minutes, and gateway stayed 192.168.0.1.

notes: Structured record generated from live session lab_tests/live_sessions/tplink_archer_ax55_v1_official_baseline_2026-05-15.md. This is an official Web UI online firmware update baseline, not a Recovery Mode, Web Recovery, or TFTP validation. Pre-upgrade configuration backup existed locally but was not read or committed. User reported the 2026-05-17 overnight check looked normal.
